name: WDF
short_description: ‘WDF’, is a horizontal shmup game with a Boss-rush style in that the difficulty will increase slightly after the player clears all stages and continues to the next loop. Each loop will be different from the other. Also, it has a main campaign mode with a longer stage and weapon upgrades.
detailed_description:
‘WDF’ is a horizontal shmup game with a Boss-rush style in that the difficulty will increase slightly after the player clears all stages and continues to the next loop. Each loop will be different from the other. Also, it has a main campaign mode with a longer stage and weapon upgrades.

Story:

The Moon has awakened—and it is hungry. No longer a cold rock in space, it radiates an unnatural fire, turning night into an extinction event. The world is burning. Humanity’s last hope: an elite strike team sent to the Moon to uncover the cause and put an end to it.

Features:

  • It has two game modes. ( Main campaign and Boss-Rush)

    • The Main campaign mode offers longer stages and weapon upgrades.

    • The Boss-Rush mode is a shorter stage with a boss that has multiple phases. Each loop adds more phases.

  • Different types of players ship with different play styles.

  • Hand-drawn animation.

  • A ton of enemy types, including bosses

  • online leaderboard
